chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-270 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on office objection (s) For hearing of main case 15.8.2025 Mr.Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh a/w Insp. Khalil-ur- Rahman, SHO PS Khybrani ************ None is present on behalf of the petitioners. Learned A.A.G files statement on behalf of respondent No.2 and SHO PS Khybrani also files his report, which are taken on record. Through instant petition, the petitioners are seeking protection and vide order dated 21.7.2025, the official respondents were already directed to provide protection to the petitioners. Therefore, in terms of above Order, instant petition stands disposed of, with directions to SHO of P.S Khybrani District Matiari to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioners, as and when approached. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to SSP Matiari for information and compliance. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
